Why LJM

The advantages of hiring someone who still answers his own phone.

Bigger painting companies mean call centres, rotating crews and quotes you wait weeks for. LJM stays small on purpose — that's what keeps the price fair and the standard high.

01

Quoted the same day

Send through a few photos or book a walk-through, and you'll have a real number back the same day — not a call back in two weeks.

02

The owner shows up, every time

No rotating crews and no subcontractors marking up someone else's quote. Leyton runs the job from first coat to last.

03

Site left cleaner than we found it

Drop sheets down, edges taped, floors covered. When the job's finished, the only thing that's changed is the paint.

04

One quote, one price

What's quoted is what's charged. No line items appearing halfway through the job.

The process

Three steps, start to finish

Free quote

Send photos or book a walk-through of the job. You'll get honest pricing back the same day, no obligation.

Prep & paint

Surfaces are properly prepped, sanded and taped before a drop of paint goes on — that's what makes a finish last.

Walkthrough & sign-off

We walk the job together before it's called done, and the site's left as tidy as we found it.

Service areas

Based in Newcastle, working right across the Central Coast

If it's within reach of Newcastle or the Central Coast, chances are we've already painted a house on your street.

Reviews

What clients say

★★★★★

I can highly recommend Leyton. I reached out for a quote and he came round the same day to have a look. The job was finished the very next day to a high standard, and his rates were reasonable for the quality of work. He's a polite young fella having a go, and I'll be using him again.

G
Gayle Farthing
Newcastle
★★★★★

Had the full exterior of our place repainted before listing it for sale. Leyton was upfront about timing, stuck to the price he quoted, and left the place spotless every afternoon. Would happily recommend to anyone on the Coast.

M
Mark Tulloch
Charlestown
★★★★★

Booked LJM for an interior repaint on a tight deadline before we moved in. He fit us in fast, the walls came up flawless, and the price matched what we were quoted from the start — no hidden extras. Couldn't ask for more.
